name: Bread and Butter Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Butter a deep dish 9 inch pie plate or 9 inch square cake pan.
3. Generously butter one side of each bread slice, but in half to make two triangles.
4. Arrange the triangles, buttered side up, in the prepared dish.
5. In a bowl, beat eggs well. Add milk, sugar and vanilla; beat together.
6. Stir in raisins.
7. Slowly pour the mixture over the bread, making sure all bread is well soaked.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until the custard has set.
9. Serve with warm maple syrup.
